title: Optimize 3 performance bottlenecks with test feedback guiding fixes

result.details:

PASS processor_fields

=== Structural Feedback Tests ===

=== RESULTS: 9 passed, 0 failed ===

=== Part 2: AST / Pattern Checks (2 points) ===
FAIL struct_no_per_record_avg: category averages still recomputed per record
PASS struct_no_json_copy: No json serialization for copying

=== Part 3: Performance / Timing Check (1 point) ===
PASS timing_5k_pipeline: 5000 records in 0.010s (limit 2.0s)

=== Summary ===
Score: 11/12
